name: Golftopia (Located inside BurgerFi)
about: Golftopia is a golf simulator and entertainment venue located inside BurgerFi in Myrtle Beach, SC. It features Trackman technology for golf simulation and provides an all-in-one experience that combines golf with food and drinks from the adjacent restaurant. The venue is designed for a casual, social atmosphere where players can enjoy a round of golf without leaving the building. Pricing is straightforward at $35 per hour for a bay, with an additional $5 for each extra player up to a maximum of six people. The facility is ideal for both golfers looking for a quick practice session and those seeking a unique venue for social gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient all-in-one golf and dining experience
Professional-level Trackman technology for accurate data
Club rentals and new balls provided for convenience
Located inside BurgerFi for easy access to food and drinks

food_and_drink.notes: All-natural food available from BurgerFi, including bowls, burgers, shakes, and custard treats. Food can be enjoyed while playing.
No alcohol is mentioned as being available for sale on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: Trackman system is the core technology used for golf simulation, with detailed ball and club tracking.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, dirty clubs are not allowed in the simulator bay. The venue has brand new Callaway clubs available for use, including women's and left-handed options.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed as the venue is located inside BurgerFi, where you can purchase food and beverages to enjoy while playing.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, but it is recommended to set up a free Trackman account prior to arrival to maximize your play time.

faq.question: Is Golftopia kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Golftopia is family-friendly and suitable for kids, with a casual atmosphere and food options available.
